query:
-- Update Chuan 川
UPDATE host_listings 
SET 
  overseasExperience = 'Lived in the US for many years before returning to Shanghai',
  languages = '["Mandarin","English"]',
  funFacts = 'I blend Guangxi, Guangdong, and Southeast Asian flavors in my cooking, creating fusion dishes that tell the story of my culinary journey',
  whyHost = 'Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I\'m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world',
  culturalPassions = 'Preserving and sharing the diverse regional cuisines of China, especially the underrepresented flavors of Guangxi and Guangdong',
  otherPassions = 'Cultural exchange through food, connecting people from different backgrounds over shared meals'
WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' AND status = 'approved';

-- Update Norika and Steven  
UPDATE host_listings
SET
  overseasExperience = 'Norika is from Japan and Steven has international corporate experience',
  languages = '["Mandarin","English","Japanese"]',
  funFacts = 'We\'re a multicultural family bringing together Japanese and Chinese home cooking traditions',
  whyHost = 'We cook for our family every day and often host relatives during holidays. We\'d love to open our home and share real family-style Chinese meals and everyday stories about life in Shanghai',
  culturalPassions = 'Bridging Japanese and Chinese culinary traditions, showing how home cooking brings families together across cultures',
  otherPassions = 'Family gatherings, sharing everyday life stories, and creating warm hospitality experiences'
WHERE hostName LIKE '%Norika%' AND status = 'approved';

-- Update Grace Tong's dumpling class
UPDATE host_listings
SET
  overseasExperience = 'Extensive international experience through work and travel',
  languages = '["Mandarin","English"]',
  funFacts = 'I specialize in teaching the art of dumpling making, a skill passed down through generations in Chinese families',
  whyHost = 'I love teaching visitors the hands-on skills of traditional Chinese cooking, especially the meditative art of folding dumplings',
  culturalPassions = 'Preserving traditional Chinese cooking techniques and passing them on to the next generation',
  otherPassions = 'Culinary education, hands-on teaching, and helping people connect with Chinese culture through cooking'
WHERE hostName LIKE '%Grace%' AND cuisineStyle LIKE '%dumpling%' AND status = 'approved';
